== Notes for [[Item:Q106761|Q106761]] ==

بسم اللہ الرحمن الرحیم ۔ کان سیدنا محمد بن میمون بن عمرو من الحجج لمولانا محمد الباقر ابن مولانا زین العابدین علیہ السلام

Sayyidna Muhammad bin Maimoon bin 'Amar was a hijjat from amongst hujaj to Maulaana Imaam Muhammad e Baaqir Ibne Maulaana Zainul 'Aabideen alaihis salaam.. He was designated by Imaam as mubashshar for Jannat .

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000012787367642

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
